channel.title: Damienbod.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Aspire Azure SQL deployment bug
item.description: This week, I was updating my Aspire applications after the latest release and I ran into a deployment bug for my test deployments. I could no longer deploy the database to Azure SQL. I got the following error: The error is caused by the latest Azure changes and the Aspire updates. To fix, I need […] Link to article: https://damienbod.com/2026/05/18/aspire-azure-sql-deployment-bug/
